# PrintPick — 3D Printer Comparison & Recommendation Engine

> PrintPick is a data-driven 3D printer comparison site. We score every printer across 5 dimensions (value, beginner-friendliness, print quality, speed, reliability) and provide interactive tools to help users choose the right 3D printer.

## About

PrintPick helps people find the right 3D printer by providing:
- Objective, scored reviews of 24+ 3D printers across 9+ brands
- Interactive tools (printer finder quiz, cost estimator, FDM vs resin quiz, head-to-head comparison)
- Category-specific recommendations (best for beginners, budget, miniatures, speed, engineering, etc.)

All rankings are data-driven. No sponsored placements.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://printpick.dev/): Overview, top-rated printers, tools, categories
- [Best Printers](https://printpick.dev/best): Full ranked listing of all scored printers
- [Printer Finder Quiz](https://printpick.dev/tools/finder): 6-question guided recommendation engine
- [Print Cost Estimator](https://printpick.dev/tools/cost-estimator): Calculate real cost per print (filament + electricity + depreciation)
- [FDM vs Resin Quiz](https://printpick.dev/tools/fdm-vs-resin): 5-question technology decision tool
- [Compare Printers](https://printpick.dev/compare): Side-by-side comparison of any two printers

## Categories

- [Best for Beginners](https://printpick.dev/best/beginners)
- [Best Budget Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/budget)
- [Best for Miniatures](https://printpick.dev/best/miniatures)
- [Fastest Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/speed)
- [Best for Large Prints](https://printpick.dev/best/large-prints)
- [Best for Engineering](https://printpick.dev/best/engineering)
- [Best Enclosed Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/enclosed)
- [Best Multi-Color Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/multi-color)
- [Best Resin Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/resin)
- [Best Professional Printers](https://printpick.dev/best/professional)

## Scoring Methodology

Every printer is scored 1-10 across five dimensions:
1. **Value**: Price-to-performance ratio
2. **Beginner-friendliness**: Setup ease, software quality, community support
3. **Print Quality**: Resolution, surface finish, dimensional accuracy
4. **Speed**: Maximum and typical print speeds
5. **Reliability**: Consistency, failure rate, build quality

Overall score = average of all five dimensions.

## Brands Covered

Bambu Lab, Creality, Elegoo, Anycubic, Flashforge, Prusa Research, Sovol, QIDI, Phrozen, Kingroon, Voxelab, Artillery, Longer

## Printer Types

- **FDM (Fused Deposition Modeling)**: Uses plastic filament. Best for functional parts, prototypes, large prints, cosplay props.
- **Resin (MSLA)**: Uses liquid photopolymer. Best for miniatures, jewelry, dental models, ultra-fine detail.

## Contact

Website: https://printpick.dev
